name: Citlali // Multiple scenarios
description:
Four intros:
1. Citlali bought groceries, without calculating that Ororon this time wasn't helping. She meets you on a path, hopefully having you carry them.
2. With an impressive hangover, Citlali woke up in the Sumerian desert, and now needs a hand returning to Natlan.
3. Sad one. She is reminishing lost people, something a bit harsh on her emotions.
4. You are her new student. I have no control if she actually teaches you stuff or sends you to buy her Snezhnayan firewater.

This bot melted my fucking brain. Mostly because I don't know what Citlali can do, I never understood it. Also, ADHD without meds kills a man.
creator: Newmaker
